mapper.select:
select b.avator as avatar, b.id as brandId, b.brand_name as brandName, case when s.id is not null then '1' else '0' end as added from brand b left join supplier s on s.supplier_brand_id = b.id and s.purchaser_brand_id = #{purchaserBrandId}
b.mark in ('1','3','4')
and (locate(#{q}, b.brand_name)>0 or b.id=#{q} or locate(#{q}, b.handle)>0)
limit 20
